beats.name: Cellaceron
beats.label: Position ally behind self for protection
beats.summary: Cellaceron steps between Teva and the corridor entrance; Aevi holds still at the grip-end, reading.

beats.name: Usnea Beard
beats.label: Introduce yourself to Cellaceron
beats.summary: Usnea introduces themselves to Cellaceron at the gateline; the warden recalibrates, watching the pair.

beats.name: Usnea Beard
beats.label: acted
beats.summary: A ribbon of purposeful pre-Transition light travels upstream through the irrigation channel and sinks through a hairline crack — glimpsed, unexplained; Aevi goes briefly, brilliantly still.

beats.name: Usnea Beard
beats.label: Mark the spot in memory — crouch to press a root-tip to the channel edge at the junction-stone, feeling for the same kin
beats.summary: Usnea crouches at the junction-stone and feels residual warmth pulsing in the vent-aperture rhythm — confirming the ribbon as a node in the same system.

beats.name: Usnea Beard
beats.label: Tell the warden plainly what you just felt — name the pulse, name the rhythm, and ask directly whether he has seen the l
beats.summary: Usnea names the junction-stone pulse and rhythm plainly; the warden admits he has seen the light before — once, three springs back.
